mapper.sql: select task_id, resource_id, task_type, task_status, retry_count, max_retry_count, progress_text, error_msg, create_by, create_time, update_time from audit_vector_task
mapper.select: select count(1) from audit_vector_task where resource_id = #{resourceId} and task_status in ('pending', 'running')
select count(1) from audit_vector_task where task_status = 'running'
mapper.insert: insert into audit_vector_task (resource_id, task_type, task_status, retry_count, max_retry_count, progress_text, error_msg, create_by, create_time, update_time) values (#{resourceId}, #{taskType}, #{taskStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetry}, #{progressText}, #{errorMsg}, #{createBy}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update audit_vector_task set task_status = 'running', progress_text = '正在执行向量化任务', error_msg = null, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId} and task_status = 'pending'
update audit_vector_task set task_status = 'success', progress_text = '向量入库完成', error_msg = null, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
update audit_vector_task set task_status = 'skipped', progress_text = '文件未变化，跳过向量化', error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
update audit_vector_task set task_status = 'failed', retry_count = ifnull(retry_count, 0) + 1, progress_text = '向量入库失败', error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}

update audit_vector_task set task_status = 'cancelled', progress_text = '文件已删除，任务已取消', error_msg = null, update_time = now() where task_status = 'pending' and resource_id in
#{resourceId}
update audit_vector_task set task_status = 'pending', progress_text = #{progressText}, error_msg = null, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
